steps.title: Apply the vertical shift
steps.content: Subtracting 11 from every $y$-value shifts the entire scatterplot — and its line of best fit — down by 11 units. The slope stays the same; the y-intercept decreases by 11.

steps.title: Compute the new intercept
steps.content:
The closest answer pair satisfying "original $-$ 11" is $53.75 - 11 = 42.75$. So the original line had y-intercept $\approx 53.75$, and the shifted line has y-intercept $\approx 42.75$.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
